formulas.formula: Gross profit = Revenue - Cost of revenue
Total operating expenses = Research and development + Sales, general and administrative
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative

formulas.formula: Operating income = Gross profit - Total operating expenses
Other income (expense), net = Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax = Operating income + Other income (expense), net
Net income = Income before income tax - Income tax expense
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

formulas.formula: Diluted weighted average shares = Basic weighted average shares + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards
components: Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards
formulas.operation: Basic weighted average shares + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

formulas.formula: Total current assets = Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities = Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total liabilities = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Total shareholders equity = Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities and shareholders equity = Total liabilities + Commitments and contingencies + Total shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by operating activities = Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Gains on investments net + Deferred income taxes - Other + Changes in working capital
components: Gains on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Gains on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Net cash used in investing activities = Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities + Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities - Other (investing)
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities
Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities + Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities - Other (investing)
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash used in financing activities = Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans + Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Change in cash = Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash = Cash and cash equivalents (reconciliation) + Restricted cash, included in prepaid expenses and other current assets

formula_checks.formula: Gross profit = Revenue - Cost of revenue
Total operating expenses = Research and development + Sales, general and administrative
Operating income = Gross profit - Total operating expenses
Other income (expense), net = Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net
Income before income tax = Operating income + Other income (expense), net
Net income = Income before income tax - Income tax expense
Diluted weighted average shares = Basic weighted average shares + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2024-04-29_2024-07-28.computation: 24578 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2023-05-01_2023-07-30.computation: 24729 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2024-01-29_2024-07-28.computation: 24599 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

2023-01-30_2023-07-30.computation: 24716 + Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards

formula_checks.formula: Total current assets = Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
Total assets = Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets
Total current liabilities = Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt
Total liabilities = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
Total shareholders equity = Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings
Total liabilities and shareholders equity = Total liabilities + Commitments and contingencies + Total shareholders equity

Net cash provided by operating activities = Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Gains on investments net + Deferred income taxes - Other + Changes in working capital

Net cash used in investing activities = Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities + Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities - Other (investing)

Net cash used in financing activities = Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Change in cash = Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash = Cash and cash equivalents (reconciliation) + Restricted cash, included in prepaid expenses and other current assets
